title: Wave-0.6: mount LocaleSwitcher + ThemeToggle in the user menu (next to Sign out)

files_to_modify: messages/en.json (+ hi/ml/es/de) ONLY if a new label string is required

acceptance_criteria: Mount <LocaleSwitcher /> and <ThemeToggle /> inside the authenticated user dropdown menu in src/components/auth-button.tsx — the same open menu panel that contains the Sign out item (around the signOut() / t('signOut') control, ~line 241-244). They render as menu rows/section near Sign out, only when the menu is open and the user is signed in.
Import the existing components as-is; do NOT modify locale-switcher.tsx or theme-toggle.tsx (they already carry their data-testid anchors from T-06). Do NOT change their internal behaviour.
Preserve all existing AuthButton behaviour: sign-in state, the dropdown open/close, Sign out, and the unauthenticated branch are unchanged. The two controls are additive.
Keyboard/focus + click-outside behaviour of the menu still works with the added rows; the added controls are reachable and operable within the open menu.
If a section label/heading string is added, add it to ALL catalogs messages/{en,hi,ml,es,de}.json per the i18n convention; otherwise no catalog change.
npm run typecheck, npm run lint, npm run test, npm run build all pass (full project stays green). git diff limited to auth-button.tsx (+ message catalogs only if a string was added).
output_format: code plus plain English: exactly where in the menu the two controls were mounted, confirmation Sign out / sign-in / open-close behaviour is unchanged, and the 4 verification results
